# What this changes

<!-- one or two sentences -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (build + data validation + policy guard + MCP smoke test)
- [ ] Data changes follow [docs/DATA_MODEL.md](../blob/main/docs/DATA_MODEL.md) and [docs/SOURCE_POLICY.md](../blob/main/docs/SOURCE_POLICY.md)
- [ ] Official-science claims cite official URLs; speculative claims carry safety flags
- [ ] If `data/` changed: ran `npm run sync-site` so the site JSON matches
- [ ] No new claims stated as fact; no omitted-teacher naming
